message:
fix(macos): lower field-count threshold in quick_scan.rs to match macos.rs

macOS lstart expands to 5 whitespace-separated tokens, so the actual
field count per ps output line is ~17-20. The threshold fix from #5 was
only applied to macos.rs but quick_scan.rs is the parser that actually
runs on macOS.

Closes #6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
